const data = items[0].json; return [{ json: { account: data.account, crm_summary: data.notes, next_step: 'Schedule budget and implementation discussion', risk: 'Implementation time concern', stage: 'Discovery', human_review_required: true } }];

meta.description: Demo workflow for turning meeting notes into CRM fields. No real CRM credentials included. Human review is required before saving updates to a CRM.
